functions.name: OnAssetReimport_Dyn__DelegateSignature
functions.description: delegate type fired when new assets have been reimported. Note: InCreatedObject can be NULL if import failed. Params: UObject* InCreatedObject

functions.name: OnAssetPreImport_Dyn__DelegateSignature
functions.description: delegate type fired when new assets are being (re-)imported. Params: UFactory* InFactory, UClass* InClass, UObject* InParent, const FName& Name, const TCHAR* Type

functions.name: OnAssetPostLODImport_Dyn__DelegateSignature
functions.description: delegate type fired when new LOD have been imported to an asset.

functions.name: OnAssetPostImport_Dyn__DelegateSignature
functions.description: delegate type fired when new assets have been (re-)imported. Note: InCreatedObject can be NULL if import failed. Params: UFactory* InFactory, UObject* InCreatedObject
